title: polygala mazandaranica
intro: Polygala mazandaranica, also known as Mazandaran polygala or Iranian milkwort, is a plant species belonging to the Polygalaceae family. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Polygala mazandaranica include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function, as well as its traditional use to treat various health conditions such as fever, cough, and skin infections. The plant can be prepared into various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and capsules, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
